nasb.text: Now, O Lord God, Your promise to my father David is fulfilled, for You have made me king over a people as numerous as the dust of the earth.

esv.text: O Lord God, let your word to David my father be now fulfilled, for you have made me king over a people as numerous as the dust of the earth.

cnv.text: 耶和華　神啊，現在求你實現你向我的父親大衛應許的話；因為你立了我作王統治這好像地上的塵土那麼多的人民。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝啊，求你成就你给我父大卫的应许。你立我为王，使我统治这多如地上尘土的百姓。
